sixteenth plan type codes) is indicated by the third and fourth digits from the right (e.g., 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_05_MM) is the monthly variable string for the fifth MC plan type. 

The monthly MC_PLAN_ID_15_MM corresponds to the managed care plan type code 
(MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_15_MM) for the same month.
